title: Sphaerostephanos heterocarpos
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos heterocarpos belongs to the family Dryniaceae. This plant is classified within the order Polypodiales. The class is Pteridopsida, a group of vascular plants that include ferns and their allies. The phylum is also Pteridophyta, which is the broader category that includes all vascular plants with vascular tissue but without seeds or flowers. Sphaerostephanos heterocarpos is a species within the genus Sphaerostephanos.

intro: Sphaerostephanos heterocarpos, also known as the Heterocarpous Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various infections and conditions. The bioactive constituents of Sphaerostephanos heterocarpos include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
